option.name: originalContent
option.value:

Manage sprint dates and PI assignments

Search & Filter

Sprint PI Start Date End Date Duration Status Actions

Edit Sprint
Create New PI

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
← Back to App Sprint Roles Admin
Sign out

Sprint Calendar Admin

Manage sprint dates and PI assignments

Search & Filter

Sprint Calendar Entries

Sprint PI Start Date End Date Duration Status Actions
Loading sprints...
Edit Sprint
Create New PI

Preview only. On create, backend recalculates again before saving.

Sprint PI Start End Duration
Loading preview...
Delete PI

This action removes all sprint records in the selected PI and cannot be undone.

Sprint Start End Status
Loading PI details...

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
# Apps Microservices
This workspace now includes app-level services under `apps/`:
- `apps/ey-sprint-business-services` - NestJS backend microservice. - `apps/ey-sprint-frontend` - frontend static service.
The legacy service in `src/` and `server.js` is preserved for compatibility during migration.

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
FROM node:20-alpine
WORKDIR /workspace/apps/ey-sprint-business-services
COPY apps/ey-sprint-business-services/package*.json ./ RUN npm install
WORKDIR /workspace COPY . .
WORKDIR /workspace/apps/ey-sprint-business-services RUN npm run build
EXPOSE 3000 CMD ["npm", "run", "start"]

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
# EY Sprint Business Services (NestJS)
NestJS backend microservice for sprint planning APIs.
## Quick Start
```bash npm install npm run start:dev ```
Service runs on `http://localhost:3000` by default and prefixes routes with `/api`.
## Tests
```bash npm test npm run test:e2e ```
## Docker
This app is containerized via `apps/ey-sprint-business-services/Dockerfile` and orchestrated in root `docker-compose.yml`.
## Main Endpoints
- `POST /api/auth/signin` - `GET /api/auth/me` - `GET /api/health` - `GET /api/submissions` - `GET /api/sprints` - `GET /api/roles` - `GET /api/teams` - `GET /api/users`
## Architecture
- `src/common` - cross-cutting concerns (guards, filters, middleware) - `src/config` - typed configuration - `src/modules` - feature modules (`auth`, `users`, `teams`, `roles`, `sprints`, `submissions`)
`SprintsService` and `SubmissionsService` are now native Nest providers migrated from legacy logic.

option.name: originalContent
option.value: { "name": "ey-sprint-business-services", "version": "1.0.0", "description": "EY Sprint Capacity Calculator – Business Services (NestJS)", "private": true, "scripts": { "build": "nest build", "start": "node dist/main", "start:dev": "nest start --watch", "start:debug": "nest start --debug --watch", "lint": "eslint \"{src,apps,libs,test}/**/*.ts\" --fix", "test": "jest", "test:watch": "jest --watch", "test:cov": "jest --coverage", "test:e2e": "jest --config ./test/jest-e2e.json" }, "dependencies": { "@nestjs/common": "^10.3.0", "@nestjs/config": "^3.2.0", "@nestjs/core": "^10.3.0", "@nestjs/jwt": "^10.2.0", "@nestjs/mongoose": "^10.0.6", "@nestjs/passport": "^10.0.3", "@nestjs/platform-express": "^10.3.0", "bcryptjs": "^2.4.3", "class-transformer": "^0.5.1", "class-validator": "^0.14.1", "mongoose": "^8.7.2", "passport": "^0.7.0", "passport-jwt": "^4.0.1", "reflect-metadata": "^0.2.2", "rxjs": "^7.8.1", "uuid": "^9.0.1" }, "devDependencies": { "@nestjs/cli": "^10.3.2", "@nestjs/schematics": "^10.1.1", "@nestjs/testing": "^10.3.0", "@types/bcryptjs": "^2.4.6", "@types/express": "^4.17.21", "@types/jest": "^29.5.12", "@types/node": "^20.12.7", "@types/passport-jwt": "^4.0.1", "@types/uuid": "^9.0.8", "@typescript-eslint/eslint-plugin": "^7.7.0", "@typescript-eslint/parser": "^7.7.0", "eslint": "^9.0.0", "jest": "^29.7.0", "mongodb-memory-server": "^10.1.0", "supertest": "^7.0.0", "ts-jest": "^29.1.2", "ts-loader": "^9.5.1", "tsconfig-paths": "^4.2.0", "typescript": "^5.4.5" }, "jest": { "moduleFileExtensions": ["js", "json", "ts"], "rootDir": "src", "testRegex": ".*\\.spec\\.ts$", "transform": { "^.+\\.(t|j)s$": "ts-jest" }, "collectCoverageFrom": ["**/*.(t|j)s"], "coverageDirectory": "../coverage", "testEnvironment": "node" } }

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: { "name": "ey-sprint-business-services", "version": "1.0.0", "description": "EY Sprint Capacity Calculator – Business Services (NestJS)", "private": true, "scripts": { "build": "nest build", "start": "node dist/main", "start:dev": "nest start --watch", "start:debug": "nest start --debug --watch", "lint": "eslint \"{src,apps,libs,test}/**/*.ts\" --fix", "test": "jest", "test:watch": "jest --watch", "test:cov": "jest --coverage", "test:e2e": "jest --config ./test/jest-e2e.json" }, "dependencies": { "@nestjs/common": "^10.3.0", "@nestjs/config": "^3.2.0", "@nestjs/core": "^10.3.0", "@nestjs/jwt": "^10.2.0", "@nestjs/mongoose": "^10.0.6", "@nestjs/passport": "^10.0.3", "@nestjs/platform-express": "^10.3.0", "bcryptjs": "^2.4.3", "class-transformer": "^0.5.1", "class-validator": "^0.14.1", "mongoose": "^8.7.2", "passport": "^0.7.0", "passport-jwt": "^4.0.1", "reflect-metadata": "^0.2.2", "rxjs": "^7.8.1", "uuid": "^9.0.1" }, "devDependencies": { "@nestjs/cli": "^10.3.2", "@nestjs/schematics": "^10.1.1", "@nestjs/testing": "^10.3.0", "@types/bcryptjs": "^2.4.6", "@types/express": "^4.17.21", "@types/jest": "^29.5.12", "@types/node": "^20.12.7", "@types/passport-jwt": "^4.0.1", "@types/uuid": "^9.0.8", "@typescript-eslint/eslint-plugin": "^7.7.0", "@typescript-eslint/parser": "^7.7.0", "eslint": "^8.57.0", "jest": "^29.7.0", "mongodb-memory-server": "^10.1.0", "supertest": "^7.0.0", "ts-jest": "^29.1.2", "ts-loader": "^9.5.1", "tsconfig-paths": "^4.2.0", "typescript": "^5.4.5" }, "jest": { "moduleFileExtensions": ["js", "json", "ts"], "rootDir": "src", "testRegex": ".*\\.spec\\.ts$", "transform": { "^.+\\.(t|j)s$": "ts-jest" }, "collectCoverageFrom": ["**/*.(t|j)s"], "coverageDirectory": "../coverage", "testEnvironment": "node" } }

option.value:
FROM node:20-alpine
WORKDIR /workspace/apps/ey-sprint-frontend
COPY apps/ey-sprint-frontend/package*.json ./ RUN npm install
WORKDIR /workspace COPY . .
WORKDIR /workspace/apps/ey-sprint-frontend
EXPOSE 3001 CMD ["npm", "run", "start"]

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
# EY Sprint Frontend Service
Static frontend microservice for Sprint CC pages.
## Quick Start
```bash npm install npm run dev ```
Default URL: `http://localhost:3001`.
This service serves the existing pages from the root `pages/` and static assets from `public/`.

option.value: /server (snapshot).js
